nodes.name: 阿拉伯半岛
nodes.summary: 阿拉伯半岛是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联45种鸟类，包括Harlequin quail、Arabian partridge、Arabian bustard等45种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 绿喉蜂虎
nodes.summary: 绿喉蜂虎（Asian green bee-eater，学名 Merops orientalis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于阿拉伯半岛，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: A Handbook.|publisher= Princeton University Press|isbn=0-7136-8028-8}} Populations in Africa and the Arabian Peninsula that were formerly assigned to this species (under the name green bee-eater) are now considered to be distinct species, the African green bee-eater and the Arabian green bee-eater. They are mainly insect eaters and they are found in grassland, thin scrub and forest often quite far from water

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: A Handbook.|publisher= Princeton University Press|isbn=0-7136-8028-8}} Populations in Africa and the Arabian Peninsula that were formerly assigned to this species (under the name green bee-eater) are now considered to be distinct species, the African green bee-eater and the Arabian green bee-eater. They are mainly insect eaters and they are found in grassland, thin scrub and forest often quite far from water
